Triggering the office sub-leasing cubicle and extreme capital circuit breaker mechanism. The false Apple global heavy industry OEM template in the original data was mercilessly cut out by the system. This enterprise named 'Lingzhuo Smart Technology' was automatically assigned the broad category of 'Electronic Device Manufacturing' by the commercial system, and its business license high-profilely claims to engage in 'smart equipment production, environmental protection equipment manufacturing.' However, the forensic logic engine directly intercepted its life-and-death extremums: the insured headcount is only 1 person, and the paid-in capital is outrageously low at 10,000 RMB! This almost touches the absolute bottom line for registering a company. Coupled with the result from the spatial probe: 'Zone B, Room 401, Block B, Dongshan International Enterprise R&D Park.' Not only is this a pure office building R&D park, but the address suffix carries 'Zone B.' In the lower-tier market, this usually means that Room 401 has been partitioned by a sublessor into several desks or micro-cubicles for rent (i.e., the so-called 'shared office' or 'cubicle registration'). In a shared cubicle, holding ten thousand RMB, the boss alone going to 'manufacture environmental protection equipment and produce smart equipment'? This constitutes an absolute cyber-level fraud. Peeling away all the manufacturing phantoms, the probe found its true means of monetization at the end of its lengthy license: 'economic information consulting, e-commerce, conference services.' The truth comes to light: this is a 100% pure 1-Person Desk-Based Shell (an intermediary/pimping agent). The boss spent a few hundred RMB to rent a virtual desk, usually doing e-commerce online, or helping people connect for conference services to earn some information price difference. Its so-called high-level 'manufacturing' tag has been completely shattered by the system.
